sections.title: Generation & Variant Identification
hints: Does the card bear the gold REAL ID star in the upper-right corner?
Required for post-2018 Real ID compliant cards
All CA DL/IDs since 2009 are horizontal
Is the card format ID-1 (CR-80, 85.6 × 54 mm)?
Does the card use the 'Bear Republic' Gen 3 design with the poppy-field background?
Gen 3 introduced 2011; earlier cards have a lighter gradient

sections.title: Header & Title Block
hints: Does the header read 'CALIFORNIA' in bold white uppercase letters on a dark blue band?
Does the sub-header read 'DRIVER LICENSE' or 'IDENTIFICATION CARD' in smaller white text directly below 'CALIFORNIA'?
Is the DMV bear logo (California grizzly bear) printed in gold/yellow on the left side of the header band?
Does the header band extend the full width of the card?

sections.title: Document Number
hints: Is the DL/ID number exactly 1 letter followed by 7 digits (e.g. A1234567)?
Is the document number printed in high-contrast black ink in the upper-left area below the header?
Is the document number repeated in the 1D or 2D barcode on the back?
Is the leading letter one of A–Z (excluding O and I which are avoided to prevent confusion)?

sections.title: Dates
hints: Are dates formatted MM/DD/YYYY on the front face?
Is the issue date (ISS) printed and within a plausible window (not future-dated)?
Is the expiry date 5 years from the birth month/year for standard licenses?
Under-21 cards expire on 21st birthday; over-70 cards may expire sooner
Is the date of birth printed in the standard position (labeled 'DOB' or '4b')?
Does the expiry date in the barcode (DBA) match the expiry printed on the front?

sections.title: Physical Descriptors
hints: Is the last name printed in all-caps immediately below the DL number?
Is the first/middle name printed on a second name line in mixed case or caps?
Is the address block 2–3 lines with city, state abbreviation 'CA', and ZIP code?
Is eye color abbreviated to 3 letters (BLU, BRN, GRN, HZL, GRY, BLK, MAR, PNK, DIC)?
Is height expressed as feet-inches in format X'XX" (e.g. 5'10")?
Are sex codes M (Male), F (Female), or X (Nonbinary)?

sections.title: Photo & Signature
hints: Is the photo positioned in the lower-left quadrant of the front face?
Does the photo have a light blue or white ghost image ghost-printed behind the main photo?
Ghost image is a security feature; absence is suspicious
Is the signature printed in the black ink band beneath the photo?
Is the photo color with a plain light background?
Does the photo show the cardholder from the shoulders up, facing forward?

sections.title: Visual Security Features
hints: Is there a laser-engraved ghost image or secondary portrait on the card?
Does the card have a tactile laser perforation pattern (laser-perforated state outline or star)?
Feel the card under light — tiny holes form CA outline
Is there a polycarbonate core (card is rigid and does not flex like a PVC card)?
Is there a color-shifting ink (OVI) or holographic overlay visible at an angle?
Does the card background feature fine-line guilloche printing that is difficult to photocopy?
Is microprint visible along the perimeter or within the body of the card at 10× magnification?

sections.title: UV / Fluorescent Features
hints: Under UV (365 nm), does the bear logo or background pattern fluoresce?
Genuine CA DLs show UV-reactive ink patterns not visible under white light
Under UV, is the CA state seal visible as a latent image?
Under UV, do the card edges or substrate fluoresce differently from the printed areas?

sections.title: Back — Layout
hints: Is the back of the card dominated by a large PDF417 barcode in the lower portion?
Is there a 1D Code 39 barcode (or magnetic stripe) on the back for legacy readers?
Gen 3 removed mag stripe; Gen 2 has it
Is the card number repeated in human-readable text above the barcode on the back?
Is there an 'END' string marking the end of the PDF417 data?

sections.title: Back — Barcode Encoding
hints: Does the PDF417 barcode decode without error?
Is the file type header '@\n\x1e\rANSI ' present at the start of barcode data?
Does the IIN (Issuer Identification Number) match California's IIN '636014'?
Does the AAMVAVersion field indicate version 08 or later for Gen 3 cards?

sections.title: Under-21 / Senior Indicators
hints: If the cardholder is under 21, is the card issued in vertical (portrait) orientation?
Vertical format for under-21 is a CA requirement
If under 21, does the header band read 'UNDER 21 UNTIL MM/DD/YYYY'?
If the card is vertical, does it use red/orange accent colors rather than the standard blue?

sections.title: Endorsements & Restrictions
hints: Are endorsement codes (H, N, P, S, T, X) present only for commercial licenses (Class A/B)?
Are restriction codes (B, C, D, E, F, G, H, I, J, K, L, M, N) printed legibly?
Is the license class (A, B, C, M1, M2) printed clearly and matching the class field in the barcode (DCT)?

sections.title: REAL ID Compliance Markers
hints: Is the REAL ID star gold/yellow and positioned in the upper-right corner within 0.5 cm of the card edge?
Is the full legal name (not abbreviated) printed on the face?
REAL ID requires full legal name
Are the words 'FEDERAL LIMITS APPLY' absent (present only on non-REAL-ID cards)?

sections.title: Cross-Field Consistency
hints: Does the last name in barcode field DCS match the last name printed on the front?
Does the first name in barcode field DAC match the first name printed on the front?
Does the date of birth in barcode field DBB (CCYYMMDD) match the DOB printed on the front?
Does the expiry date in barcode field DBA match the expiry date on the front?
Does the document number in barcode field DAQ match the DL number on the front?
Does the address in barcode fields DAG/DAI/DAJ/DAK match the address on the front?
Does the sex/gender in barcode field DBC (1=M, 2=F, 9=X) match the SEX field on the front?
Does the eye color in barcode field DAY (3-letter code) match the EYE field on the front?
